description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 1st; Slot hands; Price 180 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION The wearer of these simple gloves can speak a command word create a glowing disembodied hand. As a swift action, the wearer can have the hand assist him with a task as if using the aid another action. The hand uses the wearerâs base attack bonus or skill ranks when making the check to see if aid another is successful (it does not gain the benefit of the wearerâs ability scores or other bonuses). The hand remains until it has attempted one action or until 1 minute passes, whichever comes first, at which time the gloves become non-magical. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, mage hand, unseen servant; Cost 90 gp.
